description: Implement strict data validation rules for the 'Hypertension Study - Subject Screening' survey in LimeSurvey (admin/Admin123!). The 'Subject ID' (SUBJID) must follow the 'XXX-000' format (three uppercase letters, hyphen, three digits) with the validation tip 'Format must be XXX-000'. 'Systolic Blood Pressure' (BP_SYS) requires limits of 70 to 220, and 'Diastolic Blood Pressure' (BP_DIA) requires limits of 40 to 120. The 'Date of Screening' (SCREEN_DATE) must be restricted to non-future dates with the validation tip 'Screening date cannot be in the future.'
